text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I happen to see Narita Taishin and
Tamamo Cross talking behind one of the school
buildings.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whatcha want? Why'd ya call me out here all
of a sudden? I don't remember havin' any business
with ya.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I wanna know what Creek's into.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What she's into? I can't really thinka
anythin' in particular...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I get it now. You're tryna figure out what
to get her. Y'know, I think she'd be happy with
whatever.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean... You're right, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's with ya? Jus' spit it out already. You have
a special reason why ya wanna get her a gift?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Er... The thing is, I'm roommates with Creek, and,
well...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I don't remember my running socks fitting this
nicely before...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they looked a little worn, and you might hurt
yourself if they ripped, so I mended them!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, good luck with your training! Do your
best!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I-I don't need people to remind me to try hard...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taishin! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What do you want? I've got stuff to do.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I know you do. You're always working so
hard with all your weight lifting and stretching
and everything.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But you'll need energy to keep it up, sooo...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ta-dah! I made you a special meat and rice bowl
that's both nutritious and energizing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: This is a super important time for me too, and I want us both to keep training and working hard! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
She's always doing stuff for me, and I hate always
owing her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But I don't wanna give her anything weird, so...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, in that case, I don't got any advice
for ya. Seems like you already know what's best
to get her!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If ya wanna pay her back for her kindness, all ya
gotta do is return da favor.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If you really don't get it, I guess I can just lay out
the nitty-gritty for ya.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...No, it's fine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It'll be pointless if I don't figure it out for myself.
That's how it is, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, now you're gettin' it! Ya jus' gotta be
sincere about it, and you'll figure it out in no
time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Be sincere, huh...
Taaama? Where are youuu? It's lunchtime!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh! Tama, there you are! And Taishin too?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's on your mind? I can see your little
eyebrows furrowing away! Why don't you tell me
all about it over lun—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No, I don't. I mean, it's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's no big deal or whatever. Anyway, leave me
alone!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh goodness... Now remember, Taishin, you
mustn't push yourself too hard!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is gonna be one heckuva long struggle.
